use_cases: Form submission triggers with primary or destructive variants
Call-to-action buttons in marketing and landing pages
Interactive controls with multiple size options for different contexts
Accessible form controls with keyboard navigation and focus states
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for composition. Features standard hover, focus, and disabled states with accessible focus ring styling. Uses class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management.
